1.Title: Shadows of Twilight Past
1.Description: Upon entering the battlefield, Pyrois gains 1,000 <color=#FFFFFF>Decibels</color>. This effect can trigger once every 180s in Investigation Zone mode. CRIT Rate increases by 8%.
1.Lore:
The dark night is a tide of shadow, drowning the fields of a fallen civilization.
Deluded gods forge a blazing golden spear, seeking to pierce the throat of the abyss.

2.Title: Blazing Cavalry
2.Description: Using Ultimate: Triumphant Return grants 1,500 <color=#FFFFFF>Decibels</color>. This effect can trigger once every 180s. Pyrois's Decibel limit increases by 1,000.
2.Lore:
All forgotten stories and muffled cries sink into the arid sea behind a pair of eyes,
awaiting a chariot ablaze with searing flames to roll across the lightless surface of the abyss.

3.Title: Chains of Fate
3.Lore:
The chariot shines in splendor, the scorched earth stretches without end.
Yet within the body of an innocent child grows a tyrant destined to consume all life.

4.Title: Balefire Horizon
4.Lore:
Perhaps the beacon of first light can only be reached by passing through the darkest night. Perhaps every hero must walk a road of thorns.
So the forsaken child wanders in self-imposed exile, until the cursed fire burns away the final remains of their mortal shell.

5.Title: Youthful Guardian
5.Lore:
The tyrant's crown is remade as a bridle, with silver-white iron wardens and gallant horses.
They guard the child who burns forever, crossing beyond the digital prison and the deceptions of the night.

6.Title: Morning Star at Dawn
6.Lore:
Dusk bleeds crimson, dawn soft as ever.
The morning star has risen above the horizon, wiping away the tears of childhood.
Its soft sigh lingers like the closing rhyme of a poem.
The long night is but a prelude to sunrise.

DescriptionByLevel.1:
Upon entering battle, Pyrois gains 30 <Term:1000018>. This effect can trigger once every 180s in Investigation Zone mode. Landing different attacks on enemies grants a certain amount of <color=#FFFFFF>Solar Prominence</color>, and Pyrois also gains 0.5 <color=#FFFFFF>Solar Prominence</color> every second while in combat, up to a max of 60.
When Pyrois uses different Ultimates, they gain the following effects:
Upper Branch - Ultimate: Total Annihilation: Gain 30 Solar Prominence and enter the <Term:1000019> state. While in the Mirage state, Pyrois' Ultimate deals 40% increased CRIT DMG against Stunned enemies, and with 30 or more Solar Prominence hold <IconMap:Icon_Normal> during the 4th hit of Basic Attack: Celestial Light to immediately follow up with the 3rd hit of Basic Attack: Celestial Light. This effect lasts 21s. Repeated triggers reset the duration.
Lower Branch - Ultimate: Triumphant Return: Enter the <Term:1000020> state. While in the Sunflare state, Energy Generation Rate increases by 15%, and DMG dealt increases by <color=#2BAD00>20%</color>, and triggering a Perfect Block with an EX Special Attack grants 10 Solar Prominence. This effect lasts 200s. Repeated triggers reset the duration.
Left Branch - Ultimate: Unbound Swordstorm: Heavy attacks that hit enemies in the Contamination state deal <color=#2BAD00>450%</color> of ATK as additional DMG.
Right Branch - Ultimate: Eternal Imprisonment: Heavy attacks that hit Stunned enemies trigger the <Term:1000021> effect, dealing <color=#2BAD00>1,125%</color> of ATK as additional DMG. Upon activating this skill, the Stun duration of all currently Stunned enemies is extended by 3s. When the Finishing Move hits, the enemy's Stun state ends.

MathSkill.Title: Additional Ability: Glorious Legion
MathSkill.Description:
When another character in your squad is a <color=#FFFFFF>Stun</color> or <color=#FFFFFF>Support</color> character:
Pyrois' CRIT DMG increases by 40%.
Using a Chain Attack grants 300 <color=#FFFFFF>Decibels</color>.

1000018.Title: Solar Prominence
1000018.Description:
Upon entering the battlefield, Pyrois gains 30 <color=#FFFFFF>Solar Prominence</color>. Different attacks grant a certain amount of <color=#FFFFFF>Solar Prominence</color> when they hit enemies, and Pyrois also gains a certain amount of <color=#FFFFFF>Solar Prominence</color> every second.
With 30 or more Solar Prominence, hold <IconMap:Icon_Normal> to activate Basic Attack: Celestial Light. Each hit from Basic Attack: Celestial Light consumes a certain amount of Solar Prominence.

1000019.Title: Mirage
1000019.Description: Pyrois enters the Mirage state when using Ultimate: Total Annihilation. While in the Mirage state, Pyrois' Ultimate deals increased CRIT DMG against Stunned enemies.

1000020.Title: Sunflare
1000020.Description: Pyrois enters the Sunflare state when using Ultimate: Triumphant Return. While Sunflare is active, Energy Generation Rate and DMG dealt increase, and triggering a Perfect Block with an EX Special Attack restores additional <Term:1000018>.

1000021.Title: Totalize
1000021.Description:
Grants a special effect against Stunned enemies.
When Pyrois triggers Totalize, additional DMG is dealt, and the target's Stunned state ends.

155100001.Title: Basic Attack: Emberglow
155100001.Description:
Press <IconMap:Icon_Normal> to activate:
Performs up to three attacks forward, dealing <color=#FE437E>Ether DMG</color>.

155100002.Title: Basic Attack: Celestial Light
155100002.Description:
With 30 or more <Term:1000018>, hold <IconMap:Icon_Normal> to activate:
Unleashes up to four attacks forward, dealing massive <color=#FE437E>Ether DMG</color>.
If another character is switched in during the 3rd hit, Pyrois automatically performs the 4th hit off-field.
Each hit consumes a certain amount of Solar Prominence.
Character is invulnerable during the 3rd and 4th hits.

155100003.Title: Special Attack: Fading Rays
155100003.Description:
Press <IconMap:Icon_Special> to activate:
Performs a rush attack, dealing <color=#FE437E>Ether DMG</color>.

155100004.Title: EX Special Attack: Sun's Halo
155100004.Description:
With enough Energy, press <IconMap:Icon_SpecialReady> to activate:
Quickly charges forward and performs a series of consecutive attacks, dealing massive <color=#FE437E>Ether DMG</color>.
If hit by an enemy attack during the charge, triggers a Perfect Block effect, nullifying the damage and increasing the move's Interrupt Level to that of a Heavy Defensive Assist.
After using the skill and with 30 or more <Term:1000018>, hold <IconMap:Icon_Normal> to immediately follow up with the 3rd hit of Basic Attack: Celestial Light.
Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

155100005.Title: Special Attack: Assault Directive
155100005.Description: When an <color=#FFFFFF>Ultimate</color> or <color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack: Sun's Halo</color> is used, Phaethon performs an assist attack, dealing <color=#FE437E>Ether DMG</color>. This effect can trigger once every 2.5s, and is guaranteed to trigger when using an <color=#FFFFFF>Ultimate</color>.

155100006.Title: Dodge: Twilight
155100006.Description:
Press <IconMap:Icon_Evade> to activate:
A quick dash dodge.
Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

155100007.Title: Dash Attack: Sunrise
155100007.Description:
Press <IconMap:Icon_Normal> during a dodge to activate:
Delivers a quick slash forward, dealing <color=#FE437E>Ether DMG</color>.

155100008.Title: Dodge Counter: First Light
155100008.Description:
Press <IconMap:Icon_Normal> during a <color=#FFFFFF>Perfect Dodge</color> to activate:
Performs a forward spinning slash, dealing <color=#FE437E>Ether DMG</color>.
After using the skill and with 30 or more <Term:1000018>, hold <IconMap:Icon_Normal> to immediately follow up with the 3rd hit of Basic Attack: Celestial Light.
Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

155100009.Title: Chain Attack: Ceremonial March
155100009.Description:
When a <color=#FFFFFF>Chain Attack</color> is triggered, select the character to activate:
Performs a coordinated attack with Phaethon, dealing massive <color=#FE437E>Ether DMG</color>.
After using the skill and with 30 or more <Term:1000018>, press or hold <IconMap:Icon_Normal> to immediately follow up with the 3rd hit of Basic Attack: Celestial Light.
Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

155100010.Title: Ultimate: Total Annihilation
155100010.Description:
When Decibel Rating is at or above <color=#FFFFFF>Blasting</color>, press <IconMap:Icon_UltimateReady> and select the upper branch to activate:
After charging, performs a downward slash, dealing massive <color=#FE437E>Ether DMG</color>.
After using the skill and with 30 or more <Term:1000018>, press or hold <IconMap:Icon_Normal> to immediately follow up with the 3rd hit of Basic Attack: Celestial Light.
Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

155100011.Title: Ultimate: Triumphant Return
155100011.Description:
When Decibel Rating is at or above <color=#FFFFFF>Blasting</color>, press <IconMap:Icon_UltimateReady> and select the lower branch to activate:
Releases an energy burst in the surrounding area, dealing massive <color=#FE437E>Ether DMG</color>.
After using the skill and with 30 or more <Term:1000018>, hold <IconMap:Icon_Normal> to immediately follow up with the 3rd hit of Basic Attack: Celestial Light.
Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

155100012.Title: Ultimate: Unbound Swordstorm
155100012.Description:
When Decibel Rating is at or above <color=#FFFFFF>Blasting</color>, press <IconMap:Icon_UltimateReady> and select the left branch to activate:
Unleashes consecutive attacks forward, dealing massive <color=#FE437E>Ether DMG</color>.
After using the skill and with 30 or more <Term:1000018>, hold <IconMap:Icon_Normal> to immediately follow up with the 3rd hit of Basic Attack: Celestial Light.
Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

155100013.Title: Ultimate: Eternal Imprisonment
155100013.Description:
When Decibel Rating is at or above <color=#FFFFFF>Blasting</color>, press <IconMap:Icon_UltimateReady> and select the right branch to activate:
Gathers energy ahead before unleashing a Finishing Move, dealing massive <color=#FE437E>Ether DMG</color>.
After using the skill and with 30 or more <Term:1000018>, hold <IconMap:Icon_Normal> to immediately follow up with the 3rd hit of Basic Attack: Celestial Light.
Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

155100015.Title: Quick Assist: Duskguard
155100015.Description:
When the active character is launched, press <IconMap:Icon_Switch> to activate:
Launches a series of attacks against the target, dealing <color=#FE437E>Ether DMG</color>.
After using the skill and with 30 or more <Term:1000018>, hold <IconMap:Icon_Normal> to immediately follow up with the 3rd hit of Basic Attack: Celestial Light.
Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

155100016.Title: Defensive Assist: Ironhide Behemoth
155100016.Description:
When the on-field character is about to be attacked, press <IconMap:Icon_Switch> to activate:
Parries the enemy's attack, dealing massive Daze.
Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

155100017.Title: Assist Follow-Up: Return to Daylight
155100017.Description:
Press <IconMap:Icon_Normal> after a <color=#FFFFFF>Defensive Assist</color> to activate:
Performs a forward thrust attack, dealing <color=#FE437E>Ether DMG</color>.
After using the skill and with 30 or more <Term:1000018>, press or hold <IconMap:Icon_Normal> to immediately follow up with the 3rd hit of Basic Attack: Celestial Light.
Character is invulnerable while using this skill.
